items.title: Design & Distribution Obligations – Product Review Due by 30 Jun 2026
items.desc: TMD reviews must occur by the earlier of 5 years from issue or next scheduled review date. Confirm all TMDs are current. (CA 994B)

items.title: Breach Reporting – Hard 30-Day Deadline Continues
items.desc: No extensions under CA 912DAA / RG 78. Clock starts from knowledge of or recklessness as to the breach. Maintain Breaches Register.

items.title: FS70 / FS71 Audit Lodgement – 31 Oct 2026
items.desc: Annual financial statements and audit report due within 4 months of 30 June FY close. Engage auditor early. (CA 989A–D)

items.title: ASIC Industry Funding Levy Invoices – Due Aug/Sep 2026
items.desc: ASIC will issue 2025-26 industry funding levy invoices. Budget for payment within 30 business days of invoice. (ASIC Supervisory Cost Recovery Levy Act)

items.title: RG 97 Fee & Cost Disclosure Review – ASIC Consultation H2 2026
items.desc: ASIC flagged potential updates to fee/cost disclosure in PDSs. Monitor for consultation paper and assess impact on fund documents.

items.title: Tranche 2 Enrolment – Deadline 29 Jul 2026
items.desc: Lawyers, accountants, real estate agents newly regulated from 1 Jul 2026. Update counterparty CDD procedures if dealing with these sectors. (s51B AML/CTF Act)

items.title: Travel Rule – Virtual Asset Transfers Live 1 Jul 2026
items.desc: VASPs must exchange originator/beneficiary information on transfers ≥$1,000 AUD. Assess whether any fund crypto holdings trigger obligations.

items.title: Enhanced Ongoing CDD – Now In Effect (since 31 Mar 2026)
items.desc: Heightened ongoing CDD obligations are live. Ensure transaction monitoring rules and staff training reflect the new standard.

items.title: AML/CTF Compliance Report – 31 Aug 2026
items.desc: Annual compliance report due to AUSTRAC Board or senior officer. Document findings and remediation actions. (AML/CTF Rules Ch 8.7)

items.title: Beneficial Ownership Register – Expected Late 2026
items.desc: Treasury consulting on central BO register. Monitor for draft legislation and prepare to update verification procedures.

items.title: AER Fully Independent from ACCC – Effective 1 Jul 2026
items.desc: AER becomes a standalone regulator. Check for updated portals, contact details, and any revised reporting templates.

items.title: Enhanced Concession Disclosure – Retail Code Commences 1 Jul 2026
items.desc: Retailers must provide more frequent concession/rebate info to customers. Update systems if portfolio holds retail authorisations.

items.title: Half-Yearly Breach Reports – Due 31 Aug 2026
items.desc: AER-regulated entities submit compliance/breach reports by 28 Feb and 31 Aug. Collate H1 2026 data now.

items.title: Hardship Pricing Controls Assurance – Dec 2026 Audits
items.desc: Hardship customers must pay no more than the 'deemed better offer'. AER assurance audits expected from late 2026.

items.title: Consumer Data Right (Energy) Expansion – Watch H2 2026
items.desc: CDR for energy may extend to additional product classes. Monitor Treasury/AER announcements for compliance impacts.
